message:
fix(reactor/epoll): resolve merge conflict in deregister (keep upstream with explicit drops)

Both sides of the conflict implemented the same deregister atomicity
fix (defer remove until after kernel confirms, fcntl probe for EBADF).
Resolved to upstream version which includes explicit drop(regs) calls
in every match arm and a comment explaining the EBADF distinction.
Also includes concurrent crashpack changes from remote.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
